query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, COUNT(rp.id) as prospectCount
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN recruitment_prospects rp ON rp.referredById = u.id
WHERE u.id IN (47, 760)
GROUP BY u.id, u.name;
